title: euphorbia dulcis subsp. angulata
intro: Euphorbia dulcis subsp. angulata, also known as the Cape or African spurge, is a type of succulent plant native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Euphorbia dulcis subsp. angulata can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction of its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
